name: Glutinous Rice with Ham and Dried Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 cups glutinous rice, washed and soaked for 2 hours, then drained
1/4 cup dried shrimp, soaked to soften
4 dried forest mushrooms, soaked to soften and cut into matchsticks
1 piece Chinese preserved turnip, rinsed and finely minced
recipeInstructions:
Glutinous rice is a sticky rice high in B vitamins. Many people enjoy it during the winter months due to its high protein content which keeps them warm.
Place the rice in a heat-proof earthen pot. Add water and bring to boil. Lower heat to medium and cook, uncovered, until all water is absorbed. Combine remaining ingredients and place on top of rice. Cover and cook at the lowest heat for 20 minutes. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
